stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Using the Regulated Take-Off Weight (RTOW) table for runway 08 of Paris-Orly airport, determine the V1/VR/V2 for a take-off configuration CONF 3, given the following conditions:

QNH: 1003 HPA
OAT: +33°C
Wind: calm
Runway condition: WET
Air conditioning: ON

In case data lies between two values do not interpolate, use the most restrictive value.
